title: max-fps
description: just modpack that let you run minecraft on weak pc and boost fps
body:
Minecraft mod-pack for fps

this is modpack boost your fps

Run minecraft on weak pc

if when you play minecraft your pc can run or you have a little fps this modpack will help

Optifine features(only in max-fps-plus

it's also have optifine features so you can use custom models or something else (except zoom use spyglass)

Quilt better fabric

this modpack work on quilt that faster than fabric that faster than forge

Something features

also this modpack also give features like better crooshair(only in max-fps-plus) max-fps-plus link:https://modrinth.com/modpack/max-fps-plus

fast update

modpack will immediately update to new version.

Why this modpack

this modpack has got 2 versions 1 is max-fps standart 2 is max-fps-plus that have optifine and something features that will work on playing on server.

Freeee Cape(only in plus)

this modpack has got capes mod site of the cape mod creators: https://minecraftcapes.net/ moddermore link:https://moddermore.net/list/KB21sYAeXXyb
yeah i made logo in paint
